allow: PowerShell(where.exe pio; Get-Command pio -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($f = Get-Content "pi\\node-red\\blokken\\01_preflight\\preflight.flow.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "preflight.flow.json OK - $\($f.Count\) nodes"; $f | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'function' } | ForEach-Object { "  func: $\($_.name\)" })

PowerShell($f = Get-Content "pi\\node-red\\flows.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "flows.json OK - $\($f.Count\) nodes"; "tabs: " + \(\($f | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'tab' } | ForEach-Object { $_.label }\) -join ', '\); $ids = $f | ForEach-Object { $_.id }; $dups = $ids | Group-Object | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 }; if \($dups\) { "DUPLICATE IDS: " + \($dups.Name -join ', '\) } else { "geen dubbele ids" })
